question: Is the image a realistic photo shot from a directly overhead (top-down) perspective?
Is there mixed lighting consisting of a cool ceiling light and a warm table lamp glow?
Is the main surface a light gray marble island countertop with fine veining?
Is a stainless steel mixing bowl positioned at the center of the frame?
Does the mixing bowl contain pale beige batter with a swirl pattern and tiny air bubbles?
Is there a small drop of batter hanging from the left rim of the mixing bowl?
Are there exactly two tools (a whisk and a spatula) inserted into the mixing bowl?
Does the metal whisk handle point toward the upper right and the white spatula handle point toward the lower left?
Is there batter visibly clinging to the edge of the spatula?
Are there exactly two small bowls (one white, one black) positioned side by side to the left of the mixing bowl?
Does the white bowl contain sugar with a level surface and the black bowl contain salt with an uneven surface?
Is there a cluster of exactly seven eggs located in the upper left relative to the sugar bowl?
Among the eggs, is there one with a fine crack (upper-right), one with a pale blue shell (upper-left), and one with a gray shell showing a yolk outline (bottom)?
Is there a block of butter with a right-angle notch cut away from one corner?
Is there a butter knife lying horizontally beside the butter with a thin trace of grease on the blade?
Is there a kraft paper flour bag lying on its side in the upper left corner with the opening facing outward?
Is there a spilled flour pile spreading in an irregular fan shape that blends into black cocoa powder (gradient boundary)?
Is there a metal fine-mesh sieve lying flat with the handle pointing left, located lower right of the flour pile?
Is there a light wood-tone cutting board placed horizontally on the right side of the frame?
Are there sliced strawberry pieces on the upper half of the cutting board, including exactly one slice with bright blue flesh?
Are two small knives crossed in an 'X' shape at the lower right corner of the cutting board?
Does the black-handled knife point lower left (blade facing bottom) and the white-handled knife point lower right (blade facing top)?
Are there two glass cups along the upper edge of the cutting board: the left with pale purple milk, the right with clear water?
Are there two black baking sheets stacked with a slight offset at the bottom of the frame?
On the upper baking sheet, are dough balls arranged in a 3-row by 4-column grid pattern with gaps at the center-bottom and lower-right positions?
Do the empty gaps in the dough arrangement show faint circular oil stains?
Are exactly three of the cookie dough balls pale green?
Does the lower baking sheet contain only parchment paper with a circular press mark in the center?
Is there a wooden rolling pin placed horizontally to the left of the upper baking sheet?
Is there a pair of gray oven mitts stacked in the lower right corner with fingers pointing left?
Is there a transparent glass hourglass standing upright beside the oven mitts?
Does the hourglass contain metallic silver sand with approximately one-third fallen into the lower bulb?
Is part of a stainless steel oven door visible at the top edge with a solid black unlit control panel?
Is the image free from severe distortions or physical implausibilities (e.g., floating objects, warped geometry)?
